assertions.title: Eight to ten jade trend directions with complete showcase fields

steps.expected: Valid JSON response with trend_directions array

steps.observed: 9 directions found: 18K 金镶翡翠, 多巴胺色系耳饰, 沉香 + 翡翠叠戴, 冰感小件吊坠, 满绿翡翠古法金搭配, 蓝水翡翠简约设计, 翡翠珍珠混搭, 翡翠戒面改制耳钉, 墨翠雕刻件

steps.action: Verify each direction has required fields: Chinese name, heat_magnitude, confidence_level, time_window, judgment_state, audience_fit, price_band_fit, description/summary, why_it_matters
steps.expected: All 9 directions have all required fields
steps.observed: All 9 directions have all required fields. Confidence levels: 高, 中高, 中. Judgment states: 值得跟, 观察中, 短热噪音, 需要补证据.

assertions.title: Twenty-five to thirty evidence entries with required fields

steps.action: Count evidence entries in evidence_entries array
Verify each entry has required fields: type, related_direction, source, freshness, relevance_explanation (explanation of relevance), title (snippet/descriptive summary)
steps.expected: All entries have all required fields
steps.observed: All 28 entries have all required fields. Types found: 笔记, 图片, 评论. All 9 directions have associated evidence.

assertions.title: Sparkline-ready movement history present for homepage showcase

steps.action: Check each direction for movement_history arrays
steps.expected: Per-direction arrays of numeric values sufficient for sparkline rendering
steps.observed: All 9 directions have movement_history arrays with exactly 14 integer values each (14-day time series)

steps.action: Verify data is numeric and sufficient for sparklines
steps.expected: Arrays of numbers, no runtime crawl dependency
steps.observed: All values are integers (e.g., dir_001: [68, 72, 71, 75, 78, 82, 85, 88, 90, 92, 94, 95, 94, 92]). Data is fully local, no crawl needed.

steps.action: Check each direction for opportunity, risk, and heat numeric values
steps.expected: All directions have opportunity (x=机会), risk (y=风险), and heat (size=热度) values
steps.observed: All 9 directions have numeric opportunity, risk, and heat values. Examples: dir_001 (opportunity=85, risk=35, heat=92), dir_002 (opportunity=70, risk=55, heat=76), dir_009 (opportunity=68, risk=48, heat=64)

steps.action: Verify values are sufficient for bubble matrix placement
steps.expected: Numeric values suitable for x-y-size mapping
steps.observed: All values are integers in a 0-100 range, directly usable for bubble matrix axes and sizing

assertions.title: Prototype runs fully locally with no login and no live crawl dependency

steps.action: Fetch all 5 pages: index.html, direction-detail.html, direction-map.html, evidence.html, product-line.html
steps.expected: All return HTTP 200 with non-empty content
steps.observed: All 5 pages return HTTP 200. Sizes: index.html=19797B, direction-detail.html=21452B, direction-map.html=14703B, evidence.html=24138B, product-line.html=8965B

steps.action: Check pages for login forms, crawl triggers, or external API endpoints
steps.expected: No login, crawl, or external API dependencies
steps.observed: Zero matches for login/signin/password/authenticate keywords. Zero matches for crawl/scrape/ingest keywords. Zero external URL references across all pages.

steps.expected: jade_dashboard.json loads via HTTP 200 from local server

evidence.network: GET /index.html -> 200, GET /direction-detail.html -> 200, GET /direction-map.html -> 200, GET /evidence.html -> 200, GET /product-line.html -> 200, GET /data/jade_dashboard.json -> 200

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed. VAL-DATA-002: 9 directions with all required fields (pass). VAL-DATA-004: 28 evidence entries with all required fields (pass). VAL-DATA-007: All 9 directions have 14-value movement_history arrays for sparklines (pass). VAL-DATA-008: All 9 directions have opportunity/risk/heat numeric values for bubble matrix (pass). VAL-INFRA-002: All 5 pages load locally with no login, crawl, or external dependencies (pass).
